title: ng a needle and a vein. After some research, not all hope was lost. Anthony quic
content:
ng a needle and a vein. After some research, not all hope was lost. Anthony quickly discovered that black tar mixed with water would create something that he could ingest. He found a bottle of eye drops from his grandmother’s closest, popped the top off, and rinsed it out. Then with metal nail pick, he scraped some dope off the plastic and stuck the pick in the visible bottle. A few drops of water dissolved the sticky dope off the pick, and Anthony had monkey water. He lay down flat on the bed, and squeezed out a few drops into each nostril before setting a timer for 15 minute redose.

Speaking in tongues
Speaking in memes
Speaking in platitudes
context: From document: Amelia Be. combs her hand along her neck searching for stray hairs… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
